# terrible_community_general_nsupdate (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `record` (String) Sets the DNS record to modify. When zone is omitted this has to be absolute (ending with a dot).
- `server` (String) Apply DNS modification on this server, specified by IPv4/IPv6 address or FQDN. FQDNs are supported since community.general 12.3.0.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `key_algorithm` (String) Specify key algorithm used by `key_secret`. Use `gss-tsig` for GSS-TSIG authentication (requires the gssapi library and Kerberos credentials). `gss-tsig` was added in community.general 12.3.0.
- `key_name` (String) Use TSIG key name to authenticate against DNS `server`. Not required when using `key_algorithm=gss-tsig`.
- `key_secret` (String) Use TSIG key secret, associated with `key_name`, to authenticate against `server`. Not required when using `key_algorithm=gss-tsig`.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port` (Number) Use this TCP port when connecting to `server`.
- `protocol` (String) Sets the transport protocol (TCP or UDP). TCP is the recommended and a more robust option.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Manage DNS record.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `ttl` (Number) Sets the record TTL.
- `type` (String) Sets the record type.
- `value` (String) Sets the record value.
- `zone` (String) DNS record is modified on this `zone`. When omitted, DNS is queried to attempt finding the correct zone.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dns_rc` (Number) `dnspython` return code.
- `dns_rc_str` (String) `dnspython` return code (string representation).
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
